name: python
description: Install Python 3.12.2 and virtualenv. Pinned to mastw/mast00.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$py = 'C:\Python312\python.exe'; $log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\python-verify.log'; if (Test-Path $py) { & $py --version | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; & $py -m virtualenv --version | Out-File -FilePath $log -Append -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\python-smoke.txt') -Value 'python_ok' } else { 'python.exe not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
